title: Lebanese Villagers Bury Hezbollah Fighters, Praising Their Defiance of Israel
summary_full: After a fierce ground fight between Israeli forces and Iran-backed Hezbollah, the village of Nabi Sheet mourned its dead. “We are not here to bow,” said one villager. “We will not kneel.”
summary_public: After a fierce ground fight between Israeli forces and Iran-backed Hezbollah, the village of Nabi Sheet mourned its dead. “We are not here to bow,” said one villager. “We will not kneel.”

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: fierce ground fight between Israeli forces and Iran-backed Hezbollah
